title: satureja brivesii
intro: Satureja brivesii, also known as French savory, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Satureja brivesii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are often used to soothe the digestive system and promote overall well-being.
